title: Anbulla Sandhya Lyrics Kadhal Solla Vandhen lyrics
stanzas:
Singer : Karthik
Movie:    Kadhal Solla Vandhen
Song:    Anbulla Sandhya

Anbulla sandiyaa, unai naan kadhalikiren
nee sollum, oru vaarthai, adharkkaaga naan kaathiruppen
ennai enakku tharuvaayaa illai kaattil viduvaayaa
un badhilai edhirppaarthu ingey enadhu idhayam
enge enadhu idhayam.

Anbulla sandiyaa, unai naan kadalikiren
nee sollum, oru vaarthai, adharkkaaga.

Endhappakkam nee sellumbodhum 
endhan kaadhal aagaayam aagum
kannai moodikkondaalum maraiyadhey ....
Thooral vandhaal koalangal azhiyum 
kaalam vandhaal kalvettum azhiyum
endrum penney en kaadhal azhiyadhey ....
 
Adi koyil moodinaal kooda kili kavalaippaduvadhey illai
andha vaasal gopuram meedhu adhan kaadhal kuraivadhey illai
undhan kaaladi endhan vaazhvin veradi.

Anbulla sandiyaa, unai naan kadalikiren
nee sollum, oru vaarthai, adharkkaaga.

Thaayai kandaal thannaaley odum 
pillai poley en kaadhal aagum
anbey adhai un kangal ariyaadhaa ....
Endro yaaro un kaiyai thoduvaar
inbam thunbam ellaamey arivaai
anbey adhu naanaagakkoodaadhaa ....
 
Un kaadhal ennidam illai naan karaikka ninaikkiren kallai
Indha kaadhal enbadhey thollai uyiroadu erikkudhey ennai
Unnai neenginaal engey poven naanadi.

Anbulla sandiyaa, unai naan kadalikiren
nee sollum, oru vaarthai, adharkkaaga

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Anbulla Sandhya?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, highlighting the emotional connection between lovers.

What is the plot context of the song in Kadhal Solla Vandhen?

This song plays during a romantic moment in the movie, emphasizing the protagonist's feelings for his beloved.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Karthik and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was Anbulla Sandhya released?

The song was released on August 17, 2010.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Anbulla Sandhya, the protagonist expresses his profound love and yearning for his partner, making it a quintessential romantic ballad. The soothing melody, combined with Karthik's heartfelt vocals, creates an atmosphere of intimacy and warmth. The lyrics beautifully convey the emotions of love and anticipation, resonating with anyone who has experienced such feelings. This song is a perfect addition to any romantic occasion, evoking nostalgia and joy.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Anbulla Sandhya from Kadhal Solla Vandhen is a mesmerizing romantic melody that captures the essence of love beautifully. With Karthik's soulful voice and Yuvan's enchanting composition, this song is sure to tug at your heartstrings. Experience the magic of love through heartfelt lyrics that resonate with every listener.
stanzaMeanings: Beloved evening, I love you, you say one word, for that I will wait, will you give me or will you leave me, waiting for your answer, where is my heart, where is my heart?
Beloved evening, I love you, you say one word, for that.

Whenever you speak, my love will grow, even if I close my eyes, it won't be hidden... If the rain comes, the flowers will fade, when the time comes, my love will never fade... Even if the temple door is closed, the bird will still be worried, no, that tower gate is where my love is, no, your footsteps are the reason for my life.
Beloved evening, I love you, you say one word, for that.

When I see my mother, my love will be like a child running away, my love, do your eyes not know this... Who will touch your hand, happiness and sorrow are all knowledge, my love, that cannot be me... Your love is not with me, I think of it as a stone, this love is like a fire that burns my life, if you leave me, where will I go?
Beloved evening, I love you, you say one word, for that.
